productDisplayName: Skechers Men's Liquid Roggers Black Shoe
description: Always look good in your neighborhood with the skechers Liquid-Roggers shoe. Made of a smooth leather upper in a lace up casual sneaker design, it's a great addition to the wardrobe of the man of style.Upper Smooth leather upper with a polished look Lace-up system for a snug Fit Oxford design on the toe box Layered overlay detail on toe, sides and heel Serrated edge detailing on side stripe Tweed fabric panel on heel for breathability Embossed subtle side brand logo Lace up front for snug fit Padded collar and tongue for all-day comfort Soft fabric shoe lining Midsole Cushioned Relaxed Step comfort insole Shock absorbing EVA midsole Outsole Flexible rubber traction outsole with wavy tread design Shoe careUse a dry brush to dust off the dirtUse a branded leather polish
